title: senecio jujuyensis
intro: Senecio jujuyensis, also known as Jujuy groundsel, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the highlands of Argentina. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio jujuyensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Senecio jujuyensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
